title: Miss Universe Urges Young People to Aim for the Best
description: The reigning Miss Universe Nigeria 2022 Hannah Iribhogbe has urged young Nigerians to remain focused in their academic pursuit in a bid to achieve their desired goals. Iribhogbe stated this during a v
html:
The reigning Miss Universe Nigeria 2022 Hannah Iribhogbe has urged young Nigerians to remain focused in their academic pursuit in a bid to achieve their desired goals.

Iribhogbe stated this during a visit to Aduvie International School, Abuja weekend.

She told the students that in their desire to make a difference in Nigeria as well as the world, there is need to I wanted to make a difference in the society and my country

The Beauty Queen disclosed that she is passionate about charity, mental health and girls’ education and assured that she hopes to ensure that a lot more awareness is created during her reign.

“This is something that inspires me to want to do more for the society. I feel that when women and girls take up the space in society they are given an opportunity to better themselves. Women do not usually get the same opportunities like the men so I am here to stand as an inspiration to all the girls and make a difference in the society.

“On Mental health, this something we do not take seriously, we take it lightly. I want people to be able to freely talk about what they are struggling with in a bid to ensure the incidences of suicide especially among young people is reduced.

Iribhogbe enjoined the students’ not be satisfied with their current level but always strive to do better in all areas of life.

“Every day you are a work in progress, no one is perfect, be confident in yourself, believe in yourself. You can achieve what you want to achieve by being determined. Impossible is nothing, work hard and with education and hard work, you will get there.

“We are humans and bound to make mistakes. Things can be hard sometimes, but try to give yourself positive affirmations always. Speak positive things to yourself and what you say happens most times” She stated.

Speaking earlier, Head of School of Aduvie International School, Mr. Biodun Olusoji commended the Beauty Queen on the various charity projects she has chosen to embark on, saying that they would impact greatly on the girl child and the society at large.
